category_sources: source_facts.description identifies passphrase entry dialogs using the Assuan protocol; official GnuPG page describes Pinentry for passphrases and PINs

docs_sources: Official GnuPG related-software page documents Pinentry and its role
repo_sources: Official GnuPG Pinentry page says development takes place in a Git repository and GnuPG Git access points to dev.gnupg.org source repositories
